description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs apt-get update -y, wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/technomancy/leiningen/stable/bin/lein, chmod a+x lein, export LEIN_ROOT=1, PATH=$PATH:., tar xjf assets/phantomjs-2.1.1-linux-x86_64.tar.bz2 phantomjs-2.1.1-linux-x86_64/bin/phantomjs, mv phantomjs-2.1.1-linux-x86_64/bin/phantomjs /usr/local/bin, then lein do deps, uberjar, test, doo phantom test once, and uploads the target/uberjar/*-standalone.jar files as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a staging job that only runs on the master branch, runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y rubygems ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and deploys to Heroku with dpl --provider=heroku --app=buildfunthings --api-key=$HEROKU_STAGING_API_KEY.
